name: @guiderails/storybook-app
description: The Storybook app that hosts the Guiderails design-system demos: AgDS stories checked live by the guiderails addon's per-story criterion gate + axe. The browser layer the pure packages are verified against in Node.

scripts.test-storybook:ci: concurrently -k -s first -n SB,TEST "http-server storybook-static -p 6006 --silent" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:6006 && test-storybook --url http://127.0.0.1:6006"
